title: Bug in subselect (count function)
poc: INSERT INTO "sys"."unitTestDontDelete" VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL);

with "c3_t" as
 (
   select
     "c1_t"."A",
     "c1_t"."B",
     "c1_t"."C",
     "c1_t"."D"
   from
     "unitTestDontDelete" as "c1_t"
 )
 select
 	"c3_t"."C",
   (
     select
       count(*) 
     from
       "c3_t" as "c4_t"
     where
       "c4_t"."C" >= coalesce("c3_t"."C", 0.0) + 1
   )
   as "c2_f1"
 from
   "c3_t";
key_bug_features: Count function in subselect with NULL values
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO "sys"."unitTestFuzz" VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT "X", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "unitTestFuzz" WHERE "Z" IS NULL OR "Z" < COALESCE("Z", 0.0) + 1) AS "CountNulls" FROM "unitTestFuzz";
